vocab.meaning: một kho tàng tri thức (người thông thái)
vocab.example: My history teacher was a veritable fountain of knowledge; she could recount any historical event with stunning detail.

vocab.meaning: để lại ấn tượng sâu sắc/khó phai
vocab.example: Her passion for literature left a lasting impression on me, eventually steering me toward a career in journalism.

vocab.meaning: có được sự kính trọng từ mọi người (do tài năng hoặc tính cách)
vocab.example: He didn't need to raise his voice to keep order; his sheer expertise and charisma commanded respect from everyone.

vocab.meaning: làm tốt hơn mong đợi/vượt mức kỳ vọng
vocab.example: She would often stay late after class to help struggling students, truly going above and beyond her call of duty.

vocab.meaning: người dẫn đường, nguồn cảm hứng định hướng
vocab.example: During my rebellious teenage years, my homeroom teacher was a guiding light who kept me on the right track.

vocab.meaning: giúp ai đó bộc lộ những khả năng tốt nhất của họ
vocab.example: The best teachers are those who can bring the best out in their students, even the ones who lack confidence.

vocab.meaning: có tấm lòng nhân hậu, bao dung
vocab.example: He was quite strict with deadlines, but we all knew he had a heart of gold and genuinely cared for our well-being.

vocab.meaning: rất ngưỡng mộ và tôn trọng ai đó
vocab.example: We all thought the world of our biology teacher because of her infectious enthusiasm for the natural world.

vocab.meaning: thúc đẩy ai đó hành động ngay lập tức
vocab.example: His words of encouragement spurred me into action to start my own science project for the national fair.

vocab.meaning: một nguồn thông tin cực kỳ giá trị
vocab.example: His lectures were a gold mine of information that went far beyond what was written in the standard curriculum.
